properties.name: referer.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用防盗链过滤.

properties.name: referer.allowed-domains
properties.description: 防盗链允许的域名列表（逗号分隔）.

properties.name: xss.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 XSS 过滤.

properties.name: xss.excludes
properties.description: XSS 过滤排除的 URL 模式（逗号分隔）.

properties.name: xss.urlPatterns
properties.description: XSS 过滤拦截的 URL 模式（逗号分隔）.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.master.url
properties.description: Druid 主库 JDBC URL.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.master.username
properties.description: Druid 主库用户名.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.master.password
properties.description: Druid 主库密码.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.slave.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 Druid 从库.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.initial-size
properties.description: Druid 连接池初始大小.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.min-idle
properties.description: Druid 连接池最小空闲连接数.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.max-active
properties.description: Druid 连接池最大活跃连接数.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.max-wait
properties.description: Druid 获取连接最大等待时间 (ms).

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.connect-timeout
properties.description: Druid 连接超时时间 (ms).

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.socket-timeout
properties.description: Druid socket 超时时间 (ms).

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.time-between-eviction-runs-millis
properties.description: Druid 驱逐检查间隔 (ms).

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.min-evictable-idle-time-millis
properties.description: Druid 连接最小空闲可驱逐时间 (ms).

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.max-evictable-idle-time-millis
properties.description: Druid 连接最大空闲可驱逐时间 (ms).

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.validation-query
properties.description: Druid 连接有效性检测 SQL.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.test-while-idle
properties.description: Druid 空闲时是否检测连接有效性.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.test-on-borrow
properties.description: Druid 获取连接时是否检测有效性.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.test-on-return
properties.description: Druid 归还连接时是否检测有效性.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.web-stat-filter.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 Druid Web 统计过滤器.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.stat-view-servlet.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 Druid 监控页面.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.stat-view-servlet.allow
properties.description: Druid 监控页面允许访问的 IP.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.stat-view-servlet.url-pattern
properties.description: Druid 监控页面 URL 模式.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.stat-view-servlet.login-username
properties.description: Druid 监控页面登录用户名.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.stat-view-servlet.login-password
properties.description: Druid 监控页面登录密码.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.filter.stat.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 Druid SQL 统计过滤器.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.filter.stat.log-slow-sql
properties.description: Druid 是否记录慢 SQL.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.filter.stat.slow-sql-millis
properties.description: Druid 慢 SQL 阈值 (ms).

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.filter.stat.merge-sql
properties.description: Druid 是否合并 SQL.

properties.name: spring.datasource.druid.filter.wall.config.multi-statement-allow
properties.description: Druid Wall 过滤器是否允许多语句.

properties.name: ruoyi.name
properties.description: 项目名称.

properties.name: ruoyi.version
properties.description: 项目版本.

properties.name: ruoyi.copyright-year
properties.description: 版权年份.

properties.name: ruoyi.profile
properties.description: 文件上传路径.

properties.name: ruoyi.address-enabled
properties.description: 是否启用获取地址.

properties.name: ruoyi.captcha-type
properties.description: 验证码类型 (math / char).

properties.name: token.header
properties.description: Token 请求头名称.

properties.name: token.secret
properties.description: Token 签名密钥.

properties.name: token.expire-time
properties.description: Token 过期时间 (分钟).

properties.name: user.password.max-retry-count
properties.description: 用户密码最大重试次数.

properties.name: user.password.lock-time
properties.description: 用户密码锁定时间 (分钟).
